title: Remote install bar must reach 100% BEFORE flipping to 'Verifying…' — it switches at ~95%
description:
BUG (found live 2026-06-30, A100 Pod, LTX GGUF install): the download progress bar flips to the indeterminate 'Verifying…' sweep while still only ~95% filled, NOT at a full 100%. User read it (correctly, by the normal contract) as 'a file didn't download' — but the install actually completed fine. The bar-not-full-at-verify is a DISPLAY regression against the MPI-140 contract (download fills the bar to 100%, THEN the indeterminate verify sweep runs). 'Verifying' means downloading is DONE, so the bar MUST be full first.

ROOT (suspected, from reading routes/downloadManager.js ~1015-1041 `models:install-verifying`): the verifying tick re-broadcasts `progress: modelJob.downloadedBytes / modelJob.totalBytes` recomputed from per-dep bytes. At the moment ONE dep flips to verifying, its `downloadedBytes` is reset/not-yet-counted-full (or `_depDenominator` vs the summed bytes disagree), so the aggregate momentarily dips below 1.0 → bar renders ~95% under the indeterminate sweep. The LOCAL path (ResumableDownloader on('end') → download:verifying) parks at 100% before verify; the remote path should match.

FIX (proposed): in the `models:install-verifying` branch, pin the broadcast `progress` to 1.0 (and downloadedBytes = totalBytes) for the model job whose ALL deps are downloaded — i.e. only the post-download verify sweep should ever set indeterminate, and it must show a FULL bar. Do NOT let a mid-flight per-dep verify of one dep drag the WHOLE-MODEL aggregate below 100% while other deps are still downloading; the model-level 'Verifying…' state belongs only once every dep is byte-complete. Verify on a fresh Pod install (LTX, GGUF set): bar climbs to a visible 100%, THEN flips to 'Verifying…', THEN 'INSTALLED'. Keep local + remote consistent.

FILES: routes/downloadManager.js (`_onRemoteInstallEvent` / `models:install-verifying` ~1015; compare to the LOCAL `download:verifying` emit ~247-264 and ResumableDownloader on('end')); js/services/downloadService.js (download:progress handler ~187, phase/indeterminate). Possibly MpiInstalledDisplay bar render (does it floor progress under the indeterminate class?). BRANCH: RunPod. Relates: MPI-140 (the fill-then-verify contract this regressed), MPI-95 (the original park-at-100% choice MPI-140 superseded), MPI-163 (the install this surfaced during).

attention.reason: Bar-100% + Preparing + no-early-Verifying proven live; end-of-install 'Verifying…' sweep not yet visually confirmed on a multi-GB weight install.
